fields.title: pi-mono: adopt Symbol.for key for file-mutation-queue globalThis sharing
fields.description: The built-in file-mutation-queue.ts in pi-mono uses a module-local Map. Extensions loaded via jiti cannot import withFileMutationQueue (3-level re-export chain breaks under jiti). tau's apply_patch now uses Symbol.for('@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent:file-mutation-queues') on globalThis as the queue backing store. pi-mono should adopt the same Symbol.for key in src/core/tools/file-mutation-queue.ts so that all mutation tools (edit, write, apply_patch) serialize against a single shared queue regardless of loader boundaries. Alternative: inject withFileMutationQueue via jiti virtualModules in the extension loader (src/core/extensions/loader.ts).
